text: The surgeon demonstrates the second port configuration by measuring two to three centimeters from the ASIS and drawing a straight line to the left of the falciform ligament. Robotic ports are placed along this line, starting with the stapler port in the right lower quadrant, followed by the camera port eight to nine centimeters above, and then the number two and number three robotic arms. Assist ports are positioned in the right upper corner, allowing access to the entire left abdomen.
